testsuite.name: turbomq.storage.SnapshotManagerTest

testcase.name: readSnapshotChunk reads bytes from the snapshot checkpoint files
listSnapshots returns snapshots ordered by index descending
cleanupOldSnapshots deletes checkpoint directories from disk
listSnapshots returns empty list when no snapshots exist
cleanupOldSnapshots with retain >= count removes nothing
createSnapshot produces a checkpoint directory with RocksDB files
latestSnapshot returns empty when no snapshots exist
multiple snapshots at different indices create separate directories
cleanupOldSnapshots retains only the N most recent snapshots
snapshot checkpoint contains consistent data from time of creation
